leave_one_task_out_nearest_centroid.representation: task-level L1-normalized raw canonical-atom frequency; no BPE

limitations: The HF dataset revision postdates immutable arXiv v1 by four days.
The comparison uses two Llama sizes and raw canonical atoms, not the paper ten-agent BPE probe.
Rows per task are task-macro averaged; generation seeds and attempt order are not represented in this audit.
High task-held-out discrimination can reflect model size, trajectory length, tool-interface realization, or other configured-system cues; it is not skill transfer or monitoring utility.
scope: independent bounded reconstruction on a mutable post-v1 dataset artifact; not a reproduction of paper results
